task: Given the embedded chemistry packet containing LC-MS peak integration results for three runs (each with temperature, catalyst loading, solvent, yield %, and impurity %), apply the rule target yield > 70 and impurity < 10 to produce a deliverable named LCMS_peak_QC.csv. The CSV must include one row per provided run with original supplied values, computed QC metrics, pass/fail flags, uncertainty or sensitivity notes, and an exact citation (row/value) to the embedded packet for every reported value. Include all intermediate calculations, explicit assumptions, exceptions, validation checks, and a final decision table that ties every recommendation back to the supplied values. Do not invent additional records; mark any missing inputs as needs_review. The response must be executable from the embedded packet alone (no external data lookup).
